display.purpose: Hero H1 only. The single oversized moment per page (text-6xl to 5.25rem), text-balance.

headline.purpose: Section H2 / block titles (text-4xl to text-5xl), font-semibold.

title.purpose: Card titles (font-semibold leading-none) and feature H3 (font-medium).

body.purpose: Paragraph copy at text-base; taglines step to text-lg; long-form uses prose prose-lg.

label.purpose: Nav links, card descriptions, captions in muted-foreground (text-sm).

shadows.name: shadow-xs
shadows.purpose: Buttons. A hairline lift so controls read as pressable.

shadows.name: shadow-lg
shadows.purpose: Hero image plate, paired with ring-1 ring-background and inset-shadow-2xs.

shadows.name: header-glass
shadows.value: backdrop-filter: blur(64px); background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--background) 50%, transparent); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border)
shadows.purpose: The fixed nav. The single sanctioned blur in the system.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Nav link color shifts and hover states.

motion.name: duration-icon
motion.purpose: Hamburger Menu/X cross-fade and rotate; CardDecorator hover.

motion.name: ease-out-recommended
motion.purpose: Recommended ease-out for state transitions. Prefer over the starter's spring-bounce.

motion.name: block-entrance
motion.purpose: Framer-motion entrance on hero/blocks (AnimatedGroup, TextEffect fade-in-blur). Gate behind prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Button (default)
components.description: Primary shadcn button. Near-black on light, inverts on dark.
components.css: .ds-btn { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 1rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn--default { background: oklch(0.205 0 0); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .ds-btn--default:hover { background: oklch(0.30 0 0); } .ds-btn--default:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Button (outline)
components.description: Bordered button on the canvas; hover fills with the muted accent.
components.css: .ds-btn--outline { background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .ds-btn--outline:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-btn--outline:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Button (link)
components.css: .ds-btn--link { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.205 0 0); height: auto; padding: 0; text-underline-offset: 4px; } .ds-btn--link:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .ds-btn--link:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 0.25rem; }

components.name: CTA Pill (button-in-frame)
components.description: The hero/CTA signature: a primary button nested in a soft translucent frame for a double-edge.
components.css: .ds-cta-frame { display: inline-block; background: oklch(0.145 0 0 / 0.1); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 1rem; padding: 0.125rem; } .ds-cta-btn { border-radius: 0.875rem; padding: 0 1.25rem; height: 2.5rem; font-size: 1rem; }

components.name: Card
components.description: shadcn card: bordered, soft-shadowed, vertical rhythm.
components.html:
Visual editing
Edit content in context, no rebuild.
Open the page in TinaCMS and click any field to edit it inline.
components.css: .ds-card { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 0.875rem; padding: 1.5rem 0; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .ds-card__header { padding: 0 1.5rem; display: grid; gap: 0.375rem; } .ds-card__title { font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; } .ds-card__desc { color: oklch(0.556 0 0); font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-card__content { padding: 0 1.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; }

components.name: Feature Cell (CardDecorator)
components.description: Signature feature pattern: a dotted-grid square with radial fade centering a bordered icon tile, above a title and body.
components.html:
Composable blocks

Build pages from hero, features, stats, and CTA blocks.
components.css: .ds-feature { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; text-align: center; padding: 0 1.5rem 2rem; } .ds-deco { position: relative; margin: 0 auto; width: 9rem; height: 9rem; } .ds-deco__grid { position: absolute; inset: 0; background-image: linear-gradient(to right, oklch(0.145 0 0 / 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, oklch(0.145 0 0 / 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 24px 24px; } .ds-deco__fade { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(circle, transparent, oklch(1 0 0) 75%); } .ds-deco__tile { position: absolute; inset: 0; margin: auto; width: 3rem; height: 3rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: oklch(1 0 0); border-left: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); } .ds-feature__title { margin-top: 1.5rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-feature__body { margin-top: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Header nav inside a translucent glass bar; hover shifts foreground color only.
components.html:
Astro Starter
  • Blog
  • Docs
  • About
components.css: .ds-nav { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 3rem; padding: 1rem 1.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); background: color-mix(in oklab, oklch(1 0 0) 50%, transparent); backdrop-filter: blur(64px); } .ds-nav__brand { font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav__links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav__link { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-nav__link:hover { color: oklch(0.205 0 0); } .ds-nav__link:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 0.25rem; }

components.name: Input
components.description: Bordered field with the shared ring focus.
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 0.75rem; width: 100%; max-width: 20rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 0.5rem; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); outline-offset: 1px; border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); }

narrative.overview: This system is deliberately quiet so the content can be loud. It is the shadcn/ui foundation the TinaCMS Next.js starter is built on, adopted here so every Tina starter speaks the same visual language. The palette is a pure neutral grayscale with no fixed brand color; identity arrives from the content itself: the editor's per-section background tint, real imagery, sharp typography, and Tina-orange iconography, rather than from chrome that shouts. It is genuinely theme-aware (first-class light and dark via a .dark root class, every token defined for both) and composed rather than templated (pages built from blocks at a wide max-w-7xl rhythm, each section able to carry its own tint). The single largest risk is that a neutral shadcn shell with filler content is exactly the generic AI / SaaS template this project must not be; the defense is real content, deliberate type, and restraint, not more color in the chrome.
keyCharacteristics: Neutral OKLCH grayscale foundation; zero brand hue in the core palette.
First-class light and dark themes, every token defined for both.
Block-composed pages at a wide max-w-7xl (1280px) section rhythm.
Color is supplied by content: per-section tints, chart hues, Tina-orange icons.
shadcn/ui component vocabulary: Button (six variants), Card, translucent nav.

rules.name: The No-Brand-Chrome Rule
rules.body: The core palette has no brand hue on purpose. Color enters a page through content: the editor's per-section background tint, chart colors, Tina-orange icons, and imagery. Do not paint the header, buttons, or borders Tina orange to 'add brand'; that breaks the canvas.

rules.name: The Theme-Parity Rule
rules.body: Every color token is defined for both light and dark. Never hardcode a hex that only works in one theme; reference the semantic token so it inverts automatically.

rules.name: The Saturation-Earns-Its-Place Rule
rules.body: The only saturated colors are destructive red (actions/errors) and the chart palette (data viz). A saturated color anywhere else is a mistake.

rules.name: The One-Big-Moment Rule
rules.body: Only the hero H1 is oversized (up to 5.25rem). Section headings stop at ~3rem. Don't let a second element compete with the hero for scale.

rules.name: The Measure Rule
rules.body: Section width is wide (max-w-7xl), but text blocks are constrained: taglines to max-w-2xl, feature copy inside max-w-5xl. Never run body text the full 1280px.

rules.name: The Border-First Rule
rules.body: Reach for a 1px border before a shadow. Cards, inputs, and sections separate by stroke; shadow is a small accent on top, never the primary divider.

rules.name: The Glass-Once Rule
rules.body: The only backdrop blur is the fixed header. Do not add glass panels, blurred cards, or frosted overlays elsewhere.

dos: Do reference semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-muted-foreground, border-border) so every element inverts correctly between light and dark.
Do introduce color through content: the per-section tint picker, chart palette, Tina-orange icons, and real imagery, never the chrome.
Do compose pages from the existing blocks (hero, features, stats, CTA, content) at the max-w-7xl rhythm.
Do separate with a 1px border first; add shadow-xs/shadow-sm only as a small lift.
Do keep one oversized moment (the hero H1) per page and constrain text blocks to max-w-2xl/max-w-5xl.
Do give every control the visible focus-visible ring and respect prefers-reduced-motion on block entrance animations.
donts: Don't ship the raw shadcn default with filler copy: that is precisely the generic AI / SaaS template PRODUCT.md forbids. Differentiate through content and type, not a louder UI.
Don't paint the chrome (header, buttons, borders) Tina orange to 'add brand'; keep the canvas neutral.
Don't use saturated color outside destructive actions and charts.
Don't add backdrop blur or glass anywhere but the fixed header; no decorative glassmorphism.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards, list items, or callouts.
Don't hardcode #000/#fff or theme-specific hexes; keep a single source of truth per token.
Don't run body text the full 1280px width, and don't let a second element rival the hero for scale.
Don't lean on spring-bounce or long blur-in entrances as default motion; prefer a short ease-out and gate choreography behind reduced-motion.
